calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Three Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Amia Pulealii was present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the Minors, Elijah Tausilia Pulealii, Moses Moziah Pulealii and Ilaisa Egypt Pulealii.
Troy McGee, the minors' father, was present, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Munee Elijah Pulealii-McGee, Moses Tausilia Pulealii-McGee and Malaysia Ilaisa Pulealii-McGee.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
